name: io.github.koptsev63/premiere-claude-bridge
description: Control Adobe Premiere Pro from Claude Code (or any MCP client). Walter Murch's editing operating system baked in. Auto-log 100+ raw clips in 12 minutes; build sequences via natural-language prompts; analyze clips with motion + audio + horizon detection; watch any clip end-to-end via bundled /watch skill (free local Whisper).

environmentVariables.name: PREMIERE_BRIDGE_PORT
environmentVariables.description: WebSocket port for the CEP panel to connect to (default: 9876)
